channel.title: Knowledge-Management on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Knowledge-Management on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: The Predictive Web: What a 2001 Lecture Taught Me About the Future of AI
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: James Burke’s 2001 lecture predicted the ‘Knowledge Web’ and the transition from reductionism to connection. Decades later, Generative AI and Agentic systems are making this vision a reality.

item.title: From CRM App to LLM Knowledge Base: A Markdown-Native CRM for the Agent Era
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Exploring the shift from traditional CRM software to LLM-maintained knowledge bases, where structured markdown files serve as the system of record for the agent era.

item.title: Context Hub vs. Context7: Revolutionizing AI Coding with Accurate Documentation
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A comparison of Context Hub and Context7, two emerging tools designed to provide AI coding agents with accurate, up-to-date documentation and reduce hallucinations.

item.title: From Discovery to Knowledge
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: GenAI is to software development what LiDAR is to archaeology: exceptional at discovery, insufficient for knowledge. The real value still lies in human judgment, context, and accountability.
